external_apps.title: Tailscale
external_apps.long_description: Connect your devices into a secure private network (tailnet) with WireGuard-based mesh VPN — reach your NAS, Pi-hole and other services from anywhere.

external_apps.title: Spotify
external_apps.long_description: Stream millions of songs and podcasts and play them on the big screen.

external_apps.title: Downloader
external_apps.long_description: Downloader by AFTVnews — enter a URL or short code to download and install APKs directly on the TV. The classic first-install tool for sideloading everything else.

external_apps.title: SmartTube
external_apps.long_description: SmartTube (stable) — advanced YouTube client for Android TV: no ads, SponsorBlock, adjustable playback speed, 4K/HDR support. Installed straight from the project's GitHub releases; the download link always points at the newest stable build.

external_apps.title: Button Mapper
external_apps.long_description: Remap hardware buttons on your phone or TV remote to launch any app, shortcut or custom action.

external_apps.title: File Manager+
external_apps.short_description: File explorer for phone, tablet & TV
external_apps.long_description: Browse local storage, NAS/SMB shares, FTP servers, and cloud accounts. Manage, copy, move, and compress files across all your storage locations.

external_apps.title: Stremio
external_apps.long_description: Watch and organize video content from different services — movies, series, live TV and video channels — aggregated by an addon system.
